text_excerpt: Campaigns - Luke Taylor MP Skip to main content Luke Taylor MP Get in Touch! Campaigns Sutton Liberal Democrats Latest Updates Newsletter Donate Join Donate Join Fixing Sutton's healthcare Luke is working to improve our local health services. Read more View Keeping us safe Luke is tackling crime and policing issues head-on. Read more View Delivering Sutton's future Luke has a bold vision for a strong Sutton in a thriving Britain. Read more View Tackling local issues Luke is working to fix a range of local issues in our community. Read more View The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
